pages:
Annual Leave Policy
Employees receive 8 paid annual leave days per year.
Unused leave cannot be carried over into the next year.

Remote Work Policy
Employees may work remotely 1 day per week with department head approval.

Expense Policy
The meal reimbursement limit is 45 dollars per day.

Annual Leave Policy
Employees receive 10 paid annual leave days per year.
Unused leave cannot be carried over into the next year.

Remote Work Policy
Employees may work remotely 2 days per week with manager approval.

Expense Policy
The meal reimbursement limit is 50 dollars per day.

Annual Leave Policy
Employees receive 15 paid annual leave days per year.
Up to 5 unused leave days may be carried over into the next year.

Remote Work Policy
Employees may work remotely 3 days per week with manager approval.

Expense Policy
The meal reimbursement limit is 60 dollars per day.

Annual Leave Policy
Employees receive 18 paid annual leave days per year.
Up to 7 unused leave days may be carried over into the next year.

Remote Work Policy
Employees may work remotely 4 days per week with director approval.

Expense Policy
The meal reimbursement limit is 70 dollars per day.

Annual Leave Policy
Contractors receive 5 paid annual leave days per year.
Unused leave expires at the end of the year.

Remote Work Policy
Contractors may work remotely 2 days per week with program lead approval.

Travel Expense Policy
Hotel reimbursement is capped at 160 dollars per night.
Pre-approval is required before booking.
